children.label: A
children.text: has attained the age of 16 years; or

children.label: B
children.text: has attained an age that is greater than the age of compulsory school attendance under an applicable State law.

children.label: A
children.text: provided at public expense, under public supervision and direction, and without tuition charge; and

children.label: B
children.text: provided as elementary or secondary education in the applicable State or to preschool children.

children.label: i
children.text: any tribe or band terminated since 1940; and

children.label: ii
children.text: any tribe or band recognized by the State in which the tribe or band resides;

children.label: B
children.text: a descendant, in the first or second degree, of an individual described in subparagraph (A);

children.label: C
children.text: considered by the Secretary of the Interior to be an Indian for any purpose;

children.label: D
children.text: an Eskimo, Aleut, or other Alaska Native; or

children.label: E
children.text: a member of an organized Indian group that received a grant under the Indian Education Act of 1988 as in effect the day preceding .October 20, 1994

children.heading: Traditional leaders
children.label: 4 Traditional leaders
children.text: The term “traditional leaders” has the meaning given the term in .section 2902 of title 25
